description: Behavioral golden set for the SEO agent. Each case sends a message and asserts which tools the agent picks and what the output looks like. Run with `npm run eval` against a running stack with a configured site. Catches prompt/routing regressions that unit tests can't.

cases.message: How many pages does my site have?
Where are my biggest SEO opportunities right now? Show me quick wins.
Do I have any orphan pages? Analyze my internal linking.
Which of my pages compete for the same keywords?
What were my top search queries in the last 28 days?
Which of my pages are slow?
Rewrite the meta title and description for {PAGE_URL}.
